Data availability

Source: vignettes/data_availability.Rmd
data_availability.Rmd
Number of parametra entries by pathogen and parameter. The numbers in parentheses indicate the count of studies where these entries were collected. Total number of studies: 414

Sensitivity (57)

Specificity (46)

Incubation Period (19)

Infectious Period (76)

Latent Period (57)

Shape (5)

Fomites Transmission (5)

Survival/Disinfection (39)

Global Prevalence (1)

Herd Prevalence (73)

Basic Reproduction Number (80)

Probability Of Reactivation Of Latent Infection (2)

Probability Of Transmission Between Farms (1)

Probability Of Transmission Via Direct Contact (11)

Probability Of Transmission Via Indirect Contact (14)

Reproduction Number (18)

Transmission Parameter (126)

Within Herd Prevalence (39)

Other (56)

Not Available (9)

Diagnostic_test (62)

Infectious_latent_incuba_period (94)

Pathogen_survival (44)

Regional_prevalence (80)

Transmission (177)

Within_herd_prevalence (39)
